prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约为38724→27305→20291→17929→17706，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近4年累计前移约21000名，2025年基准位 次约17706名，前移速度有所放缓；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划：2021年115人、2022年111人、2023年109人、2024年115人、2025年114人（含马来西亚分校）；2026年计划87人（均为本部专业，未含马来西亚分校），较2025年明显缩减，缩招幅度约23.7%，竞争压力显著增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设 高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第25名（近年稳定在24–26名），属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及校园安全感知、 数学系毕业生就业争议及复试歧视传闻，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度总排名第5（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度维持高位；2025年投档异常信号 显示该校招生情况近年持续承压；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共14个：化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A 、数学A-、法学A-、化学工程与技术A-、理论经济学A-、社会学A-、马克思主义理论A-，优势学科数量多、覆盖面广，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子 信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与厦门大学在江苏物理类招生的工科试验班（AI与计算机、集成电路与电子信息、航空航天等）高度匹配；江苏省2026年普通高 考总人数约52.1万，物理类考生估算约38万，较2025年（约26万）大幅增长约46%，全省竞争全面加剧。；厦门大学位于福 建省厦门市，与江苏省地理距离适中，东南沿海区位优势明显；该校在江苏省招生规模在省外985中属中等偏上水平，江苏考生对厦大认可度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年 招生计划大幅缩减（缩招约23.7%）、江苏省物理类考生总量显著增长（增幅约46%）以及抖音高热带来的关注度提升，竞争加剧是主导方向；声誉负面信号对报考热度有一定抵消 但不足以扭转供需格局。，结合考生规模激增因素进一步下调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约14990名，区间14490–15490名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 38724 → 27305 → 20291 → 17929 → 17706, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 4 years, the cumulative upward shift is about 21,000 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 17,706, and the pace of upward movement has slowed. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu: 115 in 2021, 111 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 115 in 2024, and 114 in 2025 (including Malaysia Campus). The 2026 plan is 87 (all main campus programs, excluding Malaysia Campus), a significant reduction of about 23.7% compared to 2025, leading to notably increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (stable at 24–26 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving campus safety perceptions, employment disputes among mathematics graduates, and rumors of discrimination in re-examinations, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, maintaining high application attention. Abnormal signals in 2025 admissions indicate that the university's enrollment situation has been under pressure in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it has 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Mathematics A-, Law A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, and Marxist Theory A-. The number of advantageous disciplines is large and covers a wide range, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, closely matching Xiamen University's Engineering Experimental Classes (AI and Computer, Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information, Aerospace, etc.) in Jiangsu Physics Category admissions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu general college entrance examination is about 521,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at around 380,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (about 260,000), intensifying competition across the province. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen, Fujian Province, with moderate geographical distance from Jiangsu and obvious advantages of the southeast coastal location. Its enrollment scale in Jiangsu is at an upper-middle level among out-of-province 985 universities, and Jiangsu candidates have a high recognition of Xiamen University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (about 23.7% cut), the substantial increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu (about 46% growth), and the heightened attention from Douyin's high heat, intensified competition is the dominant trend. Negative reputation signals somewhat offset application heat but are insufficient to reverse the supply-demand pattern. Further adjusted downward due to the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 14,990, with a range of 14,490–15,490.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Nanqiang College Excellence Leadership Class)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information)
- Economics (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program selection)
- Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Intelligent Structures).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 14,990, range 14,490–15,490. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 (AI and Computer, Integrated Circuits, Economics) as the main choice, with Tier 1 (Nanqiang Leadership Class, Statistics, Accounting) as a reach. Candidates significantly better than the lower bound (<14,490) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates near the upper bound (>15,490) should mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 6457 → 5382 → 3786 → 3067 → 3261, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), reaching a low of 3067 in 2024 before slightly moving back to 3261 in 2025. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative forward movement is about 3196 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3261 for 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province: 26 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 29 in 2025 (including Malaysia Campus); 2026 plan is 16 (all main campus majors, excluding Malaysia Campus), a significant reduction of about 44.8% compared to 2025, greatly increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top in the country. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety, employment disputes in the Mathematics Department, and rumors of discrimination in re-examinations, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin heat total ranking 5th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, maintaining a high level of application attention. Advantage disciplines corresponding to History Category majors include: Law A-, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Sociology A-, Journalism and Communication (not individually rated but Xiamen University overall strength is strong), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially hot and recommended, Accounting/Finance/Auditing is moderately hot, Chinese Language/Literature is hot and recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is approximately 521,000, with an estimated 140,000 History Category candidates, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 2025 (approximately 97,000), intensifying competition across the province. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, which, like Jiangsu Province, is on the eastern coast, with obvious locational advantages, and Jiangsu candidates have a high recognition of Xiamen University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (a reduction of about 44.8%), the substantial increase in the number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (an increase of about 45%), and the increased attention brought by high Douyin heat, intensified competition is the dominant direction. Further slightly adjusted downward based on the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2334, with a range of 2001–2667.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (including selection for International Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including selection for Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Economics (including selection for Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2334, range 2001–2667. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Humanities Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication) as the main choice, with Tier 1 (Law, Accounting, Economics) as a reach. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2001) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (>2667) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.
